title: elaeocarpus sphaericus
intro: Elaeocarpus sphaericus, also known as the Round Fruit Elaeocarpus or Blue Pear Berry, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia and Australia, characterized by its small, round fruits and elliptical leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus sphaericus include reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, as well as exhibiting potential anti-diabetic and antimicrobial activities. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using the fruit as a juice, with the latter being commonly consumed in traditional medicine practices.
